summary: No, the prognosis of polymyaglia rheumatica cannot currently be accurately predicted at disease onset; existing factors like elevated inflammation markers are associated with poorer outcomes but not definitively predictive due to their correlation nature without validated algorithms or scores. Overall, PMR has an otherwise good long-term outlook if managed properly.
